sampleValues.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, hsla( 0, 0%, 55%, 0.12 ) 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(hsla( 0, 0%, 55%, 0.12 ), color-mix(in srgb, hsla( 0, 0%, 55%, 0.12 ) 65%, transparent))
sampleValues.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, hsla( 0, 0%, 55%, 0.12 ) 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(hsla( 0, 0%, 55%, 0.12 ), color-mix(in srgb, hsla( 0, 0%, 55%, 0.12 ) 65%, transparent))

--blur-background.baseline: color-mix(in srgb, #363636 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#363636, color-mix(in srgb, #363636 65%, transparent))
--blur-background.themed: color-mix(in srgb, hsla( 0, 0%, 55%, 0.12 ) 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(hsla( 0, 0%, 55%, 0.12 ), color-mix(in srgb, hsla( 0, 0%, 55%, 0.12 ) 65%, transparent))

--raised-background.baseline: color-mix(in srgb, #363636 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#363636, color-mix(in srgb, #363636 65%, transparent))
--raised-background.themed: color-mix(in srgb, hsla( 0, 0%, 55%, 0.12 ) 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(hsla( 0, 0%, 55%, 0.12 ), color-mix(in srgb, hsla( 0, 0%, 55%, 0.12 ) 65%, transparent))
